targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 hour) AS time, count() AS requests FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 hour) AS time, count() AS requests FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT round(countIf(success = 1) * 100.0 / nullIf(count(), 0), 2) AS success_pct FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}')
SELECT round(countIf(success = 1) * 100.0 / nullIf(count(), 0), 2) AS success_pct FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}')

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time, countIf(success = 1) AS "DHCPv4 success", countIf(success = 0) AS "DHCPv4 failure" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time, countIf(success = 1) AS "DHCPv6 success", countIf(success = 0) AS "DHCPv6 failure" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: DHCP requests over time — v4 vs v6 (success & failure)

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(failure_reason, 'unknown') AS reason, count() AS n FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND success = 0 AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY reason ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT coalesce(failure_reason, 'unknown') AS reason, count() AS n FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND success = 0 AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY reason ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT mac_address AS "MAC address", count() AS "Total", countIf(success = 1) AS "OK", countIf(success = 0) AS "Failed", round(countIf(success = 1) * 100.0 / nullIf(count(), 0), 1) AS "Success %" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND mac_address IS NOT NULL AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY mac_address ORDER BY "Total" DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT mac_address AS "MAC address", count() AS "Total", countIf(success = 1) AS "OK", countIf(success = 0) AS "Failed", round(countIf(success = 1) * 100.0 / nullIf(count(), 0), 1) AS "Success %" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND mac_address IS NOT NULL AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY mac_address ORDER BY "Total" DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS time, host_name, count() AS requests FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY time, host_name ORDER BY time
SELECT toString(relay_addr) AS relay, count() AS requests FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY relay ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT toString(relay_addr) AS relay, count() AS requests FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY relay ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT timestamp AS "Time", 'v4' AS "Proto", host_name AS "Server", toString(relay_addr) AS "Relay", coalesce(mac_address, '') AS "MAC", coalesce(failure_reason, '') AS "Reason" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND success = 0 AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') UNION ALL SELECT timestamp AS "Time", 'v6' AS "Proto", host_name AS "Server", toString(relay_addr) AS "Relay", coalesce(mac_address, '') AS "MAC", coalesce(failure_reason, '') AS "Reason" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND success = 0 AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') ORDER BY "Time" DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT coalesce(match_method, 'unmatched') AS method, count() AS n FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY method ORDER BY n DESC
SELECT coalesce(match_method, 'unmatched') AS method, count() AS n FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') GROUP BY method ORDER BY n DESC

SELECT coalesce(extractor_used, 'none') AS extractor, count() AS n FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') AND match_method IS NOT NULL GROUP BY extractor ORDER BY n DESC

SELECT coalesce(extractor_used, 'none') AS extractor, count() AS n FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') AND match_method IS NOT NULL GROUP BY extractor ORDER BY n DESC

panels.description: Reservations being claimed by more than one distinct client identity in the selected time range. High distinct-ID counts can indicate MAC/DUID spoofing or multiple devices behind a CPE all trying to claim the same reservation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'v4' AS "Proto", toString(reservation_ipv4) AS "Reservation", uniqExact(mac_address) AS "Distinct IDs", count() AS "Requests", countIf(success = 0) AS "Failed", arrayStringConcat(arraySlice(groupUniqArray(mac_address), 1, 5), ', ') AS "Sample identities", max(timestamp) AS "Last seen" FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') AND reservation_ipv4 IS NOT NULL AND mac_address IS NOT NULL GROUP BY reservation_ipv4 HAVING uniqExact(mac_address) > 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'v6' AS "Proto", toString(reservation_ipv6_na) AS "Reservation", greatest(uniqExact(mac_address), uniqExact(client_id)) AS "Distinct IDs", count() AS "Requests", countIf(success = 0) AS "Failed", arrayStringConcat(arraySlice(arrayDistinct(arrayConcat(groupUniqArray(coalesce(client_id, '')), groupUniqArray(coalesce(mac_address, '')))), 1, 5), ', ') AS "Sample identities", max(timestamp) AS "Last seen" FROM dhcp.events_v6 WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND match(host_name, '${host:regex}') AND reservation_ipv6_na IS NOT NULL GROUP BY reservation_ipv6_na HAVING uniqExact(mac_address) > 1 OR uniqExact(client_id) > 1 ORDER BY "Distinct IDs" DESC, "Requests" DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Reservation churn (v4 + v6)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT host_name FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE host_name != '' ORDER BY host_name
list.label: Server
list.name: host
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT host_name FROM dhcp.events_v4 WHERE host_name != '' ORDER BY host_name
